name: Ålesund Golfklubb - Solnør Gaard Golfbane
name_en: Aalesund Golf Club - Solnor Gaard Golf Course

course.viewDescription: Vakker skog- og parkbane med naturlig terreng i Skodje. En av Norges vakreste golfbaner, lokalisert ca. 30 minutter fra Ålesund sentrum.
course.viewDescription_en: Beautiful woodland and parkland course with natural terrain in Skodje. One of Norway's most beautiful golf courses, located approximately 30 minutes from Aalesund town centre.

description: Variert og utfordrende 18-hulls bane med naturlig terreng. Opprinnelig 9-hullers bane åpnet i 1995, utvidet til 18 hull i 2004. Banen byr på flott natur og god variasjon.
description_en: Varied and challenging 18-hole course with natural terrain. Originally a 9-hole course opened in 1995, extended to 18 holes in 2004. The course offers stunning scenery and good variety.

season.winterUse: Banen er stengt for sesongen fra oktober til vår. Golf simulator tilgjengelig på Moa Golfsenter hele året.
season.winterUse_en: The course is closed for the season from October to spring. Golf simulator available at Moa Golf Centre all year round.

facilities.simulatorType: Golf simulator tilgjengelig på Moa Golfsenter. Booking via Alba app eller direkte kontakt.

2025.greenFeeDescription: Greenfee: 500 kr for 18 hull, 300 kr for 9 hull. Junior betaler halv pris (250 kr for 18 hull). Medlemmer: 350 kr for 18 hull, 250 kr for 9 hull.
2025.greenFeeDescription_en: Green fee: 500 NOK for 18 holes, 300 NOK for 9 holes. Juniors pay half price (250 NOK for 18 holes). Members: 350 NOK for 18 holes, 250 NOK for 9 holes.

2026.greenFeeDescription: Greenfee: 500 kr (18 hull), 300 kr (9 hull). Junior halv pris. Gjest av medlem: 350 kr (18 hull), 250 kr (9 hull).
2026.notes: Golfbil bestilles via EAGL-appen. Rabatterte gjestesatser gjelder ved spill sammen med medlemmer med full spillerett.
2026.greenFeeDescription_en: Green fee: 500 NOK (18 holes), 300 NOK (9 holes). Junior half price. Guest of member: 350 NOK (18 holes), 250 NOK (9 holes).
2026.notes_en: Golf buggy booked via the EAGL app. Discounted guest rates apply when playing with members with full playing rights.

2026.fullMembershipDescription: Medlem 35+ år - inkl. kontingent 2000 kr + spillerett 6000 kr
2026.youngAdult26to34MembershipDescription: Medlem 26-34 år - inkl. kontingent 2000 kr + spillerett 5000 kr
2026.youngAdult20to25MembershipDescription: Medlem 20-25 år - inkl. kontingent 2000 kr + spillerett 4000 kr
2026.juniorMembership13to19Description: Junior 13-19 år - inkl. kontingent 500 kr + spillerett 1650 kr
2026.juniorMembership7to12Description: Junior 7-12 år - inkl. kontingent 500 kr + spillerett 800 kr
2026.familyMembershipDescription: Familiemedlemskap - 2 voksne (à 6000 kr) + barn under 19 år
2026.moaMembershipDescription: Moa-medlemskap - begrenset til Moa Golfsenter med rabatt på Solnør
2026.giskeMembershipDescription: Giske-medlem - inkl. kontingent 2000 kr + spillerett 5200 kr
2026.distanceMembershipDescription: Fjernmedlem - for medlemmer utenfor definerte kommuner
2026.vtgFirstYearUnder20Description: VTG 1. år under 20 år - nybegynnerkurs med spillerett
2026.vtgSecondYearDescription: VTG medlem 2. år - overgang etter nybegynnerkurs
2026.dugnadsrabatt: Inntil 1000 kr rabatt for minimum 10 timer dugnad
2026.notes: Priser godkjent på årsmøte 18. mars 2025. Dugnadsrabatt tilgjengelig for kategoriene Medlem 35+, 26-34, 20-25, Familie og Giske.
2026.fullMembershipDescription_en: Member 35+ years - incl. membership fee 2,000 NOK + playing rights 6,000 NOK
2026.youngAdult26to34MembershipDescription_en: Member 26-34 years - incl. membership fee 2,000 NOK + playing rights 5,000 NOK
2026.youngAdult20to25MembershipDescription_en: Member 20-25 years - incl. membership fee 2,000 NOK + playing rights 4,000 NOK
2026.juniorMembership13to19Description_en: Junior 13-19 years - incl. membership fee 500 NOK + playing rights 1,650 NOK
2026.juniorMembership7to12Description_en: Junior 7-12 years - incl. membership fee 500 NOK + playing rights 800 NOK
2026.familyMembershipDescription_en: Family membership - 2 adults (at 6,000 NOK each) + children under 19 years
2026.moaMembershipDescription_en: Moa membership - limited to Moa Golf Centre with discount at Solnor
2026.giskeMembershipDescription_en: Giske member - incl. membership fee 2,000 NOK + playing rights 5,200 NOK
2026.distanceMembershipDescription_en: Distance member - for members outside defined municipalities
2026.vtgFirstYear20plusDescription_en: VTG 1st year 20+ - beginners course with playing rights
2026.vtgFirstYearUnder20Description_en: VTG 1st year under 20 years - beginners course with playing rights
2026.vtgSecondYearDescription_en: VTG member 2nd year - transition after beginners course
2026.notes_en: Prices approved at annual meeting 18 March 2025. Volunteer discount available for the Member 35+, 26-34, 20-25, Family and Giske categories.
